title: Hiring Medical Officer at Drishti Eye Care

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at Drishti Eye Care
jsonLd.description:
Drishti Eye Care, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Drishti Eye Care:
Drishti Eye Care is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Drishti Eye Care!
